question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6900 and 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6783 on April 8 after a 2.5% rally on ceasefire news. To reach the 6900-6925 range by tomorrow's close requires another 1.7-2.1% gain in one day. While geopolitical volatility has created large daily moves recently, the market just experienced a significant relief rally and would need another substantial move upward. The narrow 25-point target window and single-day timeframe make this outcome unlikely despite recent volatility.
key_factors: Need for 1.7-2.1% gain in one day
